string 2:
Thanks to you, the reactor has been restored and everybody
is back.
Have you seen any Royal Knights around here?
Great!
I did see a Digimon that looked like a knight a while ago.

It was staring at some ore, saying, "This isn't pure
enough..." Then it walked away.

If it's high-purity Chrondigizoit ore it wants, its best
bet is to find a direct vein.
Right! And it's all because of you!

I never thought that I, Gallantmon, would ever stop at a
place like this...
{next}Are you a Royal Knight?
{next}King Drasil is calling for you.
{next}You should be heading for the rendezvous point!

Indeed... But how do you know of the Royal Knights? Did you
come to find me, perchance?
King Drasil...! Do you happen to know why?
What is this all about? Please impart the details.

The Royal Knights are to head for the rendezvous point?
Unfortunately, my hands are tied now.

When I came to this world, I got caught in a firewall and my
equipment got destroyed.
{next}That's awful!
{next}What's a firewall?
{next}So you kinda screwed up, huh?

It is. If I went now, I would not be able to do half of what
I am normally capable of.

A wall between worlds. The checking process is stricter on
Virus Digimon like me.
Yes, you are right. Argh. What a disgrace...

I came here to get high-purity Chrondigizoit ore to fix my
broken shield, Aegis.

But the area is occupied by evil Digimon. I do not want to
risk damaging Aegis further.
I humbly ask... Would you help me repair my equipment?
{next}Sure. I'll help you.
{end}When I'm free.

I see... I appreciate the help. I am honored
to have you as a friend.

I understand. Take your time. In the meanwhile, I shall make
preparations.

Follow me. I already have an idea of where to go. It is just
around the corner.
Hey, what do YOU guys want? Ya wanna get dug up, too?

Chaosdramon! I must have that high-purity
Chrondigizoit ore!
No way! It's all mine! I ain't givin' ya a single piece!

It ran away... If only Aegis were whole, I would have been
able to defeat it...

Oh, well. The Chrondigizoit ore comes first. This is 
all I need...

Phew. As expected with its high purity, it was quite a
challenge to process.
{next}Wow! It looks brand-new!
{next}Is your shield all fixed?
{next}You'd make a great craftsman.

I think I did quite well, too. It is a shame it will get
scratched again in battle.

Take a look at it. I bet you cannot tell where the cracks
were.

A true craftsman would not allow their equipment to be
destroyed...
I'm so ready to pay ya back fer before!
Hm? That voice...

How foolish of ya to stay here! I'm gonna dig right through
yer entire bodies!

Do not think your previous attacks will work again. With
Aegis, I can handle them all!

I'm gonna make huge holes in ya with these giant arms of
mine!
I, Gallantmon, shall not allow that!
Huh?!
This is what I, Gallantmon, am truly capable of!

No major damage to Aegis. It is restored! But I could not
have done this without your help.

I must return the favor in some way... How about something
like this?

Well, I must meet the others at the rendezvous point, so I
shall be on my way. See you soon!

Hello. Good to see you. Cards are part of a knight's
etiquette. Would you like to play?
Sure.
{end}Maybe some other time.
Now, please go easy on me...
